description: Merge the four duplicate service requests regarding the email server outage submitted by Sarah Johnson, Mike Chen, Lisa Rodriguez, and David Thompson. Sarah Johnson's ticket ('Email server completely down...') must be the parent request.

metadata.parent_subject: Email server completely down - cannot send or receive
child_subjects: Outlook keeps showing disconnected from server since 7 AM
Unable to access email since this morning - urgent
Exchange server error - email not working for entire Sales team
